sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with tomsmith / SuperSecretPassword!, then click the logout button on the secure area page

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter username and password to log in.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a heading with text 'Login Page' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the input field with name 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the input field with name 'password'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: Successfully logged in, now click the logout button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a heading with text 'Secure Area' is visible
If a button with text 'Logout' is visible

workflow.name: Logged Out Confirmation
workflow.description: Confirm that the logout action was successful.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a div with class 'flash success' and text 'You logged out of the secure area!' is visible
